raw_dataset.in_repo_reason: gitignored per .gitignore line referencing phase2-fingerprint-raw*.jsonl (decision still open per backlog item 'HADF Phase 2 backup + branch decisions' §2)
alternate_access_paths: Re-collect via scripts/hadf-phase2-collect.sh + scripts/hadf-phase2-fingerprint.py (~$5 in API spend; non-byte-identical but statistically equivalent)
Future: CDN-hosted persistent URL (planned post backup-decision)

preregistration.purpose: Commits silhouette threshold + k-range BEFORE data observed; guarantees verdict is not p-hacked

summary.purpose: The mechanical verdict produced by hadf-phase2-analyze.py against raw + preregistration. Operator replicates this.

verifier_script.purpose: Pure function (raw, prereg) → summary. Run by operator to re-derive the verdict.

pass_rule: silhouette[best_k] > 0.5 AND best_k in {3,4,5,6} (per preregistration kmeans.k_range)
fail_rule: silhouette[best_k] <= 0.5 OR best_k not in k_range OR clusters_found=false

cross_references.backlog_parent_item: HADF Phase 2 external audit (added 2026-05-10) — this pack completes step (1) of 3-phase chore

phase_e_safety.rationale: Read-only pack assembly + new audit-run dir. No infra-glob touches, no schema changes, no calibration contamination.
